content_of_post_to_comment: I know it might not seem like i done a lot from these pics, but I noticed my waist, stomach, and especially my legs have started to slowly get smaller. Im loosing on average a pound each week. can't wait to take these pics again in another 3 months
comment: Seeing waist, stomach, and legs change at that pace is usually the stuff that sticks long term, even when the scale feels slow. A pound a week is pretty steady. Do you notice clothes fitting differently yet or is it still mostly photos?
